session_summary: Decision and outcome dedupe fixture for Phase 6 extractor coverage.

user_prompts.prompt: Deduplicate repeated propositions across outcomes and decisions without dropping authored rationale.

observations.title: Adopt deterministic regression fixtures
observations.narrative: Outcome bullet currently repeats the decision proposition and should be removed once dedupe lands.

observations.title: Keep canonical evidence snapshots
observations.narrative: Outcome bullet also repeats the decision title and should not survive beside the authored decision record.

observations.title: Collect audit evidence separately
observations.narrative: A distinct non-decision outcome should still remain in Key Outcomes after dedupe.

key_decisions.rationale: Authored rationale text should survive verbatim for downstream review.

filesModified.changes_summary: Remove duplicate outcome propositions before rendering.
Suppress fallback rationale when it exactly repeats the decision title.
